body.title: Seed PROC_GOAL_CLOSE habit — map close goal trigger to goal_close tool
body.result: close_goal(None) wrapper added to ops.py — finds most recent active GOAL. PROC_GOAL_CLOSE seeded. 23 tests. Session 2026-04-02a.
body.description: When Claude Code or Akien says close goal <ticket_id>, Igor has no habit to match it. The LLM hallucinates running goals.py (does not exist). Fix: seed a code_ref habit PROC_GOAL_CLOSE with trigger: close goal|goal done|goal closed|goal complete that calls a new single-arg wrapper tool close_goal_by_ticket(ticket_id: str) which scans active GOAL memories, finds the one matching ticket_id in source_message, and calls goal_close(goal_id). Wrapper in ops.py alongside goal_close. This is the same class as store_factual/read_file — single-arg wrapper pattern from feedback_habit_dispatch_arg_limit.md.
